title: Barcode & QR scanning to column value
excerpt: The ability to scan a barcode or QR code and insert the value into a column

posts.author: Grant (Grant)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to scan a barcode or QR code and insert the value into a column

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Grant Good news! Triggelry - a monday.com marketplace app for Scanning QR to column value is now live. With Triggerly you can scan QR code and update the item value. Let me know if you have any questions!

Screenshot 2024-02-25 at 15.46.27894×628 26.7 KB

posts.author: Grant (Grant)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks, but this is not what I’m looking for. In my feature request I’m looking for Monday.com to add a QR/barcode scanner in the app(s) to insert data into the columns.
Not to generate a QR code from an item.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Got it @Grant . No need for app when you scan Triggerly QR codes - any smartphone camera will work + Once scanned it insert data into the columns - In the template screenshot you see that the integration creates a QR code each item and select what is the column to be used for inserting data.

posts.author: Rhonee (Rhonee Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml: I am not seeing the app that you are discussing above. Has it recently had a name change?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Rhonee. You can install it from our home page here monday.com QR code inventory tracking with Triggerly - Let me know if you have any question.
